16.14: Gi zin ci awЙ› Й”l tМ±uuk nice zaar ci kazi Acinan Jooi Aneet o nЙ›Й›n. Ma tМ±uuwi nicana Е‹aan abil Е‹aao aЕ‹Й›r Kadec been BЙ›rЙ›d zЙ›Й› been inoko o.
16.15: Mazi akЙ” amiironek Egar kЙ”rЙ”k o Abram, Е‹intimiliny nЙ”kЙ” otowa niini Е‹Й›Й›rin, ma akanek Abram dole zaar ci kazi Ismayil ebaal aduwan Jooi e.

17.1: Mazi een Abram irkitowa eet wec kamЙ”tЙ” ki tiin tЙ”rkЙ”c (99), eyelizak Jooi nЙ”Й”nЙ” Й›lЙ› bodo, ma anek nЙ›, вЂњKeen Jook o kanyei dЙ”yiz dook. Ziiyan aneet tugu kaal ci abon.
17.2: ЕЉaan bodo kagoon naana terkediin onan been ineet, ma kanyin ineet dЙ”l ci dЙ”l cugun kiziti mЙ›Й›lЙ› gЙ›r.вЂќ
17.3: Oloca ni Abram Й”Й” Е‹aati adiЕ‹diЕ‹ani Jook, ma anek Jooi nЙ”Й”nЙ” nЙ›,
17.4: вЂњInoko katerkedekin naana ineet gi ci ka izi niina jijiti boryok ci meelik.
17.5: Inoko ineet alaЕ‹ bodo kazi zaar cugun nЙ› Abram, bar kazi zaar cugun nЙ› Ibrayim, eeci niina katin een baati Й”l ci meel.
17.6: Kanyin katin ineet dЙ”l ci dolenu kizi mЙ›Й›lЙ› kadala loocok, ma eegin katin ogЙ›n Е‹aatineeЕ‹ alaat ci adiЕ‹diЕ‹ loocowЙ›.
17.7: Kanyi tiЕ‹eere terkediin onan kibil nЙ”kЙ” kodot Е‹aatun kibeen dolene ci dЙ”l cugun. Ma keen naana Jook cun nЙ”kЙ”, ma keen buk Jook ci dЙ”l ci dЙ”l cugun.
17.8: Kanyin tiЕ‹eere ineet been dЙ”l ci dolenu looc ci inoko Й›Й›nЙ› niina modЙ›n ci akЙ”m eet ci agayin noko. Ma lЙ”Й”ci ci kazi Kanan noko dook izi looc ci dЙ”l ci dЙ”l cugun izi nЙ›Й›n, ma keen naana Jook cineeЕ‹ nЙ”kЙ”.вЂќ
17.9: Ma anek Jooi Ibrayim bodo nЙ›, вЂњZin niina libire cun abon azoonЙ› gi o karicanekin naana ineet tugu. Ma abon buk agЙ”Й”n dЙ”lya ci dЙ”l cugun nЙ”kЙ”.
17.10: Abona zin Й”l o macik Е‹aatunooЕ‹ dook ateedi.
17.11: Abona niiga ateedinu ka kizi teedinЙ›t nici bayen ci terkediin onan aneet kibeen ineet.
17.12: Utuguz gi nico nЙ”kЙ” zЙ›Й› been bulok ci katin Е‹aan aavu e. Ma aritai dole ci mac Е‹aatunooЕ‹, mazi adica niini iinya turge, abon ateedu niiga nЙ”Й”nЙ”. Utuguzek buk gi nico gabara ci mac aritai Е‹aatunooЕ‹ been gabara ci ataalanu ole ogЙ›n.
17.13: Ж†l ci maci dook abon agЙ”Й”n nЙ”kЙ” ka keyelizai terkediin onane abil kodot teedinte cunooЕ‹ o.
17.14: Ma Й›Й›ti calaЕ‹ atЙ›Й›di, alaЕ‹ akeebonek niini Й”l ogan, eeci alaЕ‹ azooni niini terkediin onan.вЂќ
17.15: Ma anek bodo Jooi Ibrayim nЙ›, вЂњInoko Е‹aa cun kazi Sarai noko alaЕ‹ bodo kazi zaar cigin nЙ› Sarai, bar kizi zaar cigin nЙ› Sara.
17.16: ЕЉaan kamayui naana nЙ”Й”nЙ” ka kitirayin logoz. Ma buk kamayui naana nЙ”Й”nЙ” ka kizi yaati boryok ci meelik, ma aritai katin dolene ci dЙ”l cigin alaata ci adikir.вЂќ
17.17: Akati ni Ibrayim kozoЕ‹ti looc Е‹aati adiЕ‹diЕ‹ani Jook, ma ararni Й›lЙ› maany ziniza azi nЙ›, вЂњKu ka kitira dole Е‹aati kizЙ”yЙ› matuwoc ceen irkitowa eet tur (100) o? Ku buk ka kitira Sara dole Е‹aati izЙ”i niini matuwoc ceen irkitowa eet wec kamЙ”tЙ” (90) o?вЂќ
17.18: Enek ni niini Jook nЙ›, вЂњInoko mГЈ amayui Ismayil, avadanan koca niini aneet labak.вЂќ
17.19: Bar anek Jooi nЙ”Й”nЙ” nЙ›, вЂњAkЙ”m! ЕЉaan aritakin Е‹aa cune kazi Sara noko logoz, ma akanei nЙ”Й”nЙ” zaar ci kazi Aizak. ЕЉaan kazoonЙ› naana terkediin onan baal kaduwa e nЙ”kЙ” kodot Е‹aatin kibeen dolene ci dЙ”l cigin.
17.20: Maje giye ci akati Ismayil kazii zЙ”Й”z cun o. ЕЉaan zin kamayui nЙ”Й”nЙ”, ma kanyi nЙ”Й”nЙ” dЙ”l kibeen dЙ”l ci dolenu kizi mЙ›Й›lЙ›. Ma een niini katin jijiti alaat ceen amЙ”tЙ” ram, ma kagoon katin naana dЙ”l cigin kizi bor ci appe.
17.21: Bar zin Е‹aan kagoon gi o kaduwa naana terkediinte onan Е‹aati Е‹Й›Й›run o kazi Aizak o Е‹aan aritai niini Е‹aati Sara irkite ci Е‹aan aku e.вЂќ
17.22: Mazi akЙ” atМ±ornЙ›kЙ› Jooi zooze onin ki Ibrayim, Й”tЙ”Й” niini.
17.23: Taman nЙ”kЙ” iitene nice Й›lЙ› ozooti Ibrayim zЙ”Й”z o Joowo, ma atЙ›Й›t Е‹Й›Й›rin o kazi Ismayil been buk gabara o aritai ole onin, ki o ataalyai, ma ateedi maczЙ›t dook Й”lЙ”.
17.24: Ma ateedi buk Ibrayim niinilya Е‹aati izitЙ”i irkitowa eet wec kamЙ”tЙ” ki tiin tЙ”rkЙ”c (99).
17.25: Aje Ismayil ceen Е‹Й›Й›rin o izi irkitowa amЙ”nki iiyu waanci baal ateedinЙ› niini neke.
17.26: Ma eteede niigi dook iiten codoi tМ±Й”r nЙ”kЙ”,
17.27: kibeen gabara o kЙ”rЙ”k onin dook.

18.1: Ma iitene oman eyelezak Jooi Ibrayim Й›lЙ› Е‹aati ajЙ”Е‹Й”z kЙ›Й›n o Mamra. Iitene nice aavi niini loota ceez onin een rum rЙ›Й›rna waaz iilya Е‹aati aburni kЙ”r.
18.2: Mazi adЙ”Е‹ Й”Й”, acin Й”l ceen iiyu Й›Й›l. Bar tЙ› codoi Е‹aatineeЕ‹ Jook gi, maje raman toonnyak. Maje Ibrayim alaЕ‹ aga. Mazi acin niini nЙ”Й”gЙ”, odokonyozek ook urumek gЙ”l, ma akЙ” azaa nЙ”Й”gЙ” Е‹aati adiЕ‹diЕ‹ani.
18.3: Ma anek nЙ›, вЂњManyi, mГЈ areezaЕ‹ niiga aneet, mГЎ adiceku. Ivita uyubuzit rak ole can o Е‹aato.
18.4: AnycaЕ‹ kanyaayuЕ‹ maam ci ka otoonyci zЙ”Й” ka uyubuzit rak raa Е‹ina.
18.5: Ka buk kanyaayuЕ‹ dayiin ci atiritu eleeti Е‹aan awoyu.вЂќ Ma abЙ›dЙ›kЙ› niigi Ibrayim anek nЙ›, вЂњAbona. Tugu eci aduwa o.вЂќ
18.6: Iyiik ni Ibrayim ook kЙ›Й›mawa, ma akЙ” anek Sara nЙ›, вЂњDoma tela ci vЙ”Й”r taman. ЕЉЙ”Й”ny ka aayek kernok dМ±Й”kЙ›n.вЂќ
18.7: Ma adokonyonek Ibrayim tiin, ma akЙ” acina ariz ci Е‹aan een mЙ”r ci adii Й”rЙ”Й”t. Ma anyaa, ma aku anyek gabaren kotodoЕ‹ek nЙ”Й”gЙ”.
18.8: Anyaa ni Ibrayim Е‹oroc kibeen iira been idi, ma anyek nЙ”Й”gЙ” kadaktЙ”. Ma arЙ› niini nЙ”Й”gЙ” raa Е‹inaante.
18.9: Ma ajin niigi Ibrayim anek nЙ›, вЂњAavi Е‹aa ununЙ› Е‹aadМ±aЕ‹?вЂќ AbЙ›dЙ›kЙ› niini nЙ”Й”gЙ” anek nЙ›, вЂњAavi kЙ›Й›mawa Е‹aate.вЂќ
18.10: Ma anek kernoiti codoi Ibrayim nЙ›, вЂњDidilЙ› tiЕ‹eere irkite ci aku e nyelowe nico ma kabada, kamЙ”da anyak Sara ceen Е‹aa cun noko logoz anyЙ”tЙ”i.вЂќ Maje Sara aziirar nЙ”Й”gЙ” kЙ›Й›mawa eecitЙ”.
18.11: Aje waanice Ibrayim been Sara iziti matuwo Й”rЙ”Й”t Й›lЙ›. Sara alaЕ‹aan anyak maam ugeec Е‹aanu.
18.12: Atarari ni Sara Й›lЙ› maany, ma azi ziniza nЙ›, вЂњInoko naaga dook kizita matuwo. Ku oca ka kanyakta dole o?вЂќ
18.13: Ijin ni Manyi Ibrayim enek nЙ›, вЂњNaa arar Sara, ma azi nЙ›, Didi dim ka kanyak dole Е‹aati kizЙ”yЙ› matuwoc o ku?
18.14: Anyak gi ci akЙ”mnek Jook tЙ”? Inoko zin abil eona kaduwakin ineet e. TiЕ‹eere irkite ci aku e nyelowe nico ma kabada, kajowa Sara anyawun logoz.вЂќ
18.15: Zin giye o aЕ‹olin Sara nЙ”Й”nЙ”, adaЕ‹Й” niini izi nЙ›, вЂњЕЉaan katarar.вЂќ Ma anek Jooi nЙ”Й”nЙ” nЙ›, вЂњAtararu uyen. MГЎ adaЕ‹e gaga.вЂќ Ilalek Ibrayim Jook giye ci akati Sodom
18.16: Mazi awЙ” kernowa nicigi, itoonek Ibrayim nЙ”Й”gЙ” gЙ”l. Mazi avЙ” arum niigi Е‹inti kutul, icinit Sodom.
18.17: Izi ni Manyi Jooi nЙ›, вЂњAlaЕ‹ abon Е‹aati karЙ”Й”dЙ› Ibrayim gi ci karooЕ‹ kutugu noko.
18.18: Eeci dЙ”lya ci dЙ”l cigin katin niigi eegin bor ci appe adЙ”i kak, ma amayuwi katin modЙ›na dook zaare cigin.
18.19: Eeci kЙ›Е‹Й›ra naana nЙ”Й”nЙ” ka kuduwak niini dЙ”l ci dolenu kiziiktan aneet ka kutuguzЙ” kaal ci abon, ka kozooti naana terkediin onan Е‹aatineeЕ‹.вЂќ
18.20: Enek ni Jooi Ibrayim nЙ›, вЂњKazii kaviyak ci Й”l ci Sodom ki Gomora agЙ”Й”n niigi kaal ci gЙ›r Й”rЙ”Й”t, ma anyayit niigi oЕ‹Й› ci gЙ›r appe Й”rЙ”Й”t Й›lЙ›.
18.21: KarooЕ‹ zin kook kicin naanalya mГЈ didi agЙ”Й”n niigi kaal ci gЙ›r kiyo aduyai o, ka kaga.вЂќ
18.22: Idicek ni toonnyawa Й”Й”t ki Sodom. Maje Manyi Jooi Е‹aan Й›Й›l niini ki Ibrayim.
18.23: Iicayak ni Ibrayim nЙ”Й”nЙ”, ma ajin anek nЙ›, вЂњAnyak gi ci karooЕ‹ kijinin. Didi dim niina akЙ” uulal Й”l ci gЙ›r been Й”l o abon buk Е‹inaante?
18.24: MГЈ ajowa Й”l ci abon een eet ram kamЙ”tЙ” (50), uulal ni Е‹inite, ma alaЕ‹ uuЕ‹ giye ci akati nЙ”Й”gЙ”?
18.25: Kagayin alaЕ‹ agoon nЙ”kЙ”. AlaЕ‹ uulal Й”l o gЙ›r kibeen o abon buk, eeci alaЕ‹ abon Е‹aati apirnanЙ› niina nЙ”Й”gЙ” dook gole codoi. Kagayin alaЕ‹ agoon nЙ”kЙ”, eeci een niina alaan o looc dook, ma apai niina kaal juruЕ‹ keelit tЙ”p.вЂќ
18.26: Ma abЙ›dЙ›kЙ› Jooi nЙ”Й”nЙ” anek nЙ›, вЂњMГЈ kajowa Й”l ci abon een eet ram kamЙ”tЙ” (50), kooЕ‹ koca kutur nice giye cineeЕ‹ calaЕ‹ kuulal.вЂќ
18.27: Ma abЙ›dЙ›kЙ› Ibrayim nЙ”Й”nЙ” bodo anek nЙ›, вЂњKeen naana eet ci deer labak. Olla kalayin ineet bodo karooЕ‹ kijinin.
18.28: MГЈ ajowa niina Й”l ci abon een eet ram ki tiin tur (45), uulal koca kutur dook?вЂќ Ma abЙ›dЙ›kЙ› Jooi nЙ”Й”nЙ” anek nЙ›, вЂњMГЈ kajowa Й”l ci abon een eet ram ki tiin tur (45), alaЕ‹ kuulal kutur nice.вЂќ
18.29: Bodo ajin Ibrayim nЙ”Й”nЙ” anek nЙ›, вЂњMГЈ ajowa Й”l ci abon een eet ram (40), uulal koca kutur dook?вЂќ Ma abЙ›dЙ›kЙ› niini nЙ”Й”nЙ” anek nЙ›, вЂњMГЈ kajowa Й”l ci abon een eet ram (40), alaЕ‹ kuulal kutur dook.вЂќ
18.30: Ilalek ni bodo Ibrayim Jook enek nЙ›, вЂњMГЎ da abornekan nЙ”Е‹ mГЈ kijinin bodo. MГЈ ajowa Й”l ci abon een eetoma kamЙ”tЙ” (30), uulal koca kutur dook?вЂќ Ma abЙ›dЙ›kЙ› niini nЙ”Й”nЙ” anek nЙ›, вЂњMГЈ kajowa Й”l ci abon een eetoma kamЙ”tЙ” (30), alaЕ‹ koca kuulal kutur.вЂќ
18.31: Ma anek Ibrayim Jook nЙ›, вЂњNyan kЙ›mЙ›da kijinin bodo. MГЈ ajowa Й”l ci abon een eetom (20), uulal koca kutur dook?вЂќ Ma abЙ›dЙ›kЙ› niini nЙ”Й”nЙ” anek nЙ›, вЂњMГЈ kajowa Й”l ci abon een eetom (20), alaЕ‹ koca kuulal kutur.вЂќ
18.32: Ma ilalek bodo Ibrayim nЙ”Й”nЙ” anek nЙ›, вЂњManyi Jook, mГЎ abornekan nЙ”Е‹. KarooЕ‹ kijinin bodo lak codoi tМ±Й”r nЙ”kЙ”. MГЈ ajowa Й”l ci abon een amЙ”tЙ” (10), uulal koca kutur dook?вЂќ Ma abЙ›dЙ›kЙ› Jooi nЙ”Й”nЙ” anek nЙ›, вЂњMГЈ kajowa Й”l ci abon een amЙ”tЙ” (10), alaЕ‹ koca kuulal kutur.вЂќ
18.33: Mazi akЙ” odotiz niigi zЙ”Й”za, idicek Jooi. Ma amiironek Ibrayim kЙ”rЙ”k onin.

19.1: Ma avunak toonnyawa ceen ram o Sodom yomana, maje Lat aavi kutur araana. Mazi acin niini nЙ”Й”gЙ”, itiЕ‹a jena, ma akЙ” arumek gЙ”l, ma azaa nЙ”Й”gЙ” Е‹aati adiЕ‹diЕ‹ani.
19.2: Ma anek nЙ”Й”gЙ” nЙ›, вЂњManyigi, ivita kЙ”rЙ”k can cЙ›lbЙ›z noko Е‹aato ka otoonyit zЙ”Й”, ma ayubuzu baalin nico ole can o Е‹ina. ЕЉaan aloku Е‹eere ririwЙ”na.вЂќ Bar abarzek niigi nЙ”Й”nЙ” anek nЙ›, вЂњAkЙ”m! ЕЉaan koogina kutur kЙ›Е‹a Е‹ina.вЂќ
19.3: Ma ilalek Lat nЙ”Й”gЙ” kivitak kЙ”rЙ”k. Makacin agamta niigi orkorit ki nЙ”Й”nЙ”. Ma akЙ” agoonek niini nЙ”Й”gЙ” dayiin ceen dМ±Й”kЙ›n alaЕ‹ amokcar.
19.4: Mazi Е‹aan acinЙ› niigi nЙ”kЙ”, ivita Й”l o Sodom macik dook, lЙ”gЙ”zЙ›t been Й”l o adikir buk, ma avu aliya ceez.
19.5: Ma awo Lat, ma ajin anek nЙ›, вЂњAavtiz Й”l ona avunak kЙ”rЙ”k cun o e Е‹aa? Dunaket nЙ”Й”gЙ” bitaala Е‹aato. KarooЕ‹nya ka kЙ”Е‹Й”zta.вЂќ
19.6: Uduna ni Lat bitaalin, ma anyook karogi eci bawuco.
19.7: Ma anek nЙ”Й”gЙ” nЙ›, вЂњЖ†l ogan, kilalekuЕ‹ igeet calaЕ‹ agoonu gi ci gЙ›r abil nЙ”kЙ”.
19.8: Eelit di, kanyei dЙ”l ceen kabarzЙ› Е‹aan aavtiz baala. AnycaЕ‹ kudunakuЕ‹ nЙ”Й”gЙ”. ЕЉaan agooneku nЙ”Й”gЙ” gi ci olla arooЕ‹nyu niiga utuguzek. AlaЕ‹ abon Е‹aati agoonu gi ci abil nЙ”kЙ” ole nicoko, eeci ivitayan niigi aneet ole can o.вЂќ
19.9: Bar anek niigi Lat nЙ›, вЂњMadayЙ› Е‹aatinaaЕ‹. Een niina modЙ›n ci rЙ›Е‹. Niina ineet Е‹Й›nЙ›Й›n ci ka duwayet gi ci kagoona o? NyЙ› Е‹aatinaaЕ‹. MГЈ alaЕ‹ anyeke, kagoonekin koca ineet gi ci gЙ›r bar kujuk ci ka kutuguzeya nЙ”Й”gЙ” o.вЂќ Ma ayЙ”Й”t niigi Lat, ma uubunek karogi ka kooyoyit.
19.10: Enico Й›lЙ› udunta toonnyawa, ma agurak Lat ceez eecitЙ”, ma anyook karogi.
19.11: Ma atooza niigi Й”l o aavtiz ceez tatoga e dook kЙ›bЙ›rЙ› kiziti rubenЙ› calaЕ‹ aga Е‹inti abilni karogi. Ma adun niigi.
19.12: Enektek ni toonnyawa Lat nЙ›, вЂњMГЈ anyei Е‹Й›Й›rugun ki bЙ›Й›nyugun ki kavanЙ› been atenok ci abaak kuture nico, viri nЙ”Й”gЙ” rЙ›Й›na.
19.13: Itoonanet Jooi ageeta ka kivita kilipta kutur nico, eeci gerzitin uneeЕ‹ izi appe Й”rЙ”Й”t zЙ›Й› makacin otobor Jooi.вЂќ
19.14: Ook ni Lat ole o arЙ”Й”Е‹ kirikti bЙ›Й›nyigin, ma akЙ” anek nЙ›, вЂњIyiikta Й›nyЙ›ktЙ› Е‹ina, eeci arЙ”Й”Е‹ Jooi kuulal kutur nico.вЂќ Bar anyek niigi zЙ”Й”z nico kizi bЙ”yЙ›n.
19.15: Mazi Е‹aan arire lЙ”Й”ci, omolmolanek toonnyawa Lat kiyiik. Anek niigi nЙ”Й”nЙ” nЙ›, вЂњIyiik taman. Biti Е‹aa unun been bЙ›Й›nyugun ween ram e Й›nyЙ›ktЙ› Е‹ina, gЙ›rzЙ› Е‹aan adaaknu tedec ma alibe kuturi nici.вЂќ
19.16: Mazi Е‹aan miltiЕ‹ Lat nЙ”kЙ”, agamit toonnyawa nЙ”Й”nЙ” aziit ki Е‹aa onin been bЙ›Й›nyigin ween ram, ma avЙ”yi nЙ”Й”gЙ” zЙ›Й› ma aduЕ‹ni kutura, eeci awucnek niigi Jook.
19.17: Ma Е‹inaante enek toonnyaiti codoi nЙ”Й”gЙ” nЙ›, вЂњOdokonyit! MГЎ abuudenu gЙ”la. Odokonyit Й”Й”tЙ” biyЙ›nЙ› ka calaЕ‹ adaaЕ‹nu.вЂќ
19.18: Bar abЙ›dЙ›kЙ› Lat nЙ”Й”gЙ” anek nЙ›, вЂњAkЙ”m Manyigi. MГЎ anyet kutuguza nЙ”kЙ”.
19.19: Inoko uyene itiritaЕ‹u niiga aneeta laadun, ma Й›Й›ltawaЕ‹u korok. Inoko zin biyЙ›n rЙ›Й›nЙ› Й”rЙ”Й”t. KaЕ‹ole karabЙ”Е‹ kadaai maЕ‹aan kurum Е‹inite.

20.11: Ma vurta mazi agamit guruc odot, Й”Й”t oyoyit eet o mano e.
20.12: Anek niigi nЙ”Й”nЙ” nЙ›, вЂњЖ†l ci ona avu akana liЕ‹liЕ‹Й”n vurta o aliЕ‹liЕ‹ niigi ziit codoi tМ±Й”r nЙ”kЙ”. Maje naaga kaliЕ‹liЕ‹nya uyene iiten dook kore ci abur pЙ›r. AlaЕ‹ abon zin Е‹aati waan katobona naaga kibeen nЙ”Й”gЙ” guruci.вЂќ
20.13: Ma abarzek Й›Й›ti ci mano noko eet codoi Е‹aatineeЕ‹ anek nЙ›, вЂњZiik di, gЙ”tЙ”n. AlaЕ‹ kadakuЕ‹ looc nЙ”kЙ” been nЙ›Й›n. Uyene agamtawu liЕ‹liЕ‹Й”n ka iliЕ‹liЕ‹it gurucoc codoi iiten dook.

20.28: Utuguz niiga kiyo buk naana ЕЉЙ›Й›rti Eeto o. AlaЕ‹ kakun ka kiiya kiliЕ‹liЕ‹tozeyan Й”l aneet, bar kakun ka kiiya kiliЕ‹liЕ‹ozek naana Й”l, ma kadaai ka korogoz Й”l ci meel.вЂќ Arogoz Yesu Й”l ci ruben een ram

20.31: Maje Й”l ceen kЙ”lЙ› Й”rkЙ”r ki Yesu noko agernyek nЙ”Й”gЙ” kajaktЙ”. Bar enico egerenyit niigi Й”rЙ”Й”t Й›lЙ› kujuk we azi nЙ›, вЂњЕЉЙ›Й›rti Devid, tiritet da!вЂќ

21.1: Mazi avunak niigi Е‹ino kazi Bezpeja ajЙ”Е‹zЙ” ki JerusalЙ›m biye o kazi KiЕ‹iroc, Е‹inaante itoonun Yesu nuyawe ogin ram karaktЙ›.
21.2: Anek nЙ”Й”gЙ” nЙ›, вЂњЖ†Й”tЙ” korogjowe ci Й›Й›l igeet Й”Й”wa neke. AvЙ” tedec ajowanu zigir ci acabje kibeen jЙ”rЙ”n Е‹inaante. Ж†Й”kta zin nЙ”Й”gЙ” dook ramantiya ka anyaaktayaЕ‹ Е‹ina.

21.5: вЂњEnektek Й”l o JerusalЙ›m nЙ›, Icinit di, iiyayuЕ‹ alaani unooЕ‹. AcЙ›lbЙ›zЙ›n niini Й›lЙ›, ma awЙ” joronte ci zigiro.вЂќ

21.8: Maje kЙ”lЙ› ci meelik gЙ›r avetek rumane gЙ”l kЙ›Е‹. Maje ogЙ›n acarkiza bЙ”lЙ”k, ci keenu, ma avu avetek gЙ”l buk.

21.14: Ma Е‹inaante ivitak nЙ”Й”nЙ” Й”l ci Е‹Й”Й”lik ki ci ruben, ma arogoz niini nЙ”Й”gЙ” dook lai.

23.37: Ma azi Yesu nЙ›, вЂњJerusalЙ›m, JerusalЙ›m, uruwu niina nyakaЕ‹anЙ›t kadaayitЙ”, ma avacu buk Й”l o itoonakin Jooi ineet biyЙ›nЙ› kadaayitЙ”. Lak ci mЙ›Й›lЙ› gЙ›r ci karЙ”Й”Е‹Й› gЙ”Й”n kanyabotai Й”l ugun kiyo gЙ”Й”n alotek toloci jЙ”rЙ” ogin kЙ›Е‹ o, bar zin niina Е‹aan nyan kutugu nЙ”kЙ”.

24.3: Mazi akЙ” aavi Yesu loota biye o kazi KiЕ‹iroc, ivitak nuyawa nЙ”Й”nЙ” doon Е‹inaante. Ma avu ajin anek nЙ›, вЂњDuwayet di. Ma kaala nici dook akanai tiЕ‹a? TiЕ‹eere ma ka ija, akanai gitaz ci ka kagaya badaan unun kibeen dican o loocu?вЂќ
24.4: Ma abЙ›dЙ›kЙ› Yesu nЙ”Й”gЙ” anek nЙ›, вЂњEgenyit juruЕ‹ ka kЙ”kЙ”m eet ci alabanuЕ‹.
24.5: Eeci tiЕ‹eere avu Й”l ci meelik zaare ogan, ma avu azi nЙ›, Aneeta Kiristo nЙ›Й›n. Ma alaba tiЕ‹eere niigi Й”l ci meelik.

24.10: TiЕ‹eere iinyaye niceke Й”l ci meelik amiiri ki vurut tuwente uneeЕ‹. Akat tiЕ‹eere Й”l ci amiiri ki vurut o gЙ”nЙ”gi o Е‹aan atuwe vЙ”lЙ”Е‹a, ma amarnin niigi nЙ”Й”gЙ”.

24.13: Bar zin Й›Й›ti ci amЙ›na amЙ›z kaal nicoko dook zЙ›Й› ma atМ±ornЙ›kЙ›, arogzЙ› tiЕ‹eere niini.
24.14: Maje zin tiЕ‹eere kaviyawa o abon akati baliin o Joowo uuwawonek rak loocok dook zЙ›Й› ma azii modЙ›na dook. Mazi odot, kiiya ni.
24.15: Acinu katin gi o gЙ›r Й”rЙ”Й”t baal aduwa nyakaЕ‹ani o kazi Danyel e. Acinu tiЕ‹eere nЙ”Й”nЙ” abil Е‹aao Joowo taabinto. (Abon zin aziiЕ‹nu gi nico juruЕ‹.)

24.30: Zin enice Е‹aan ayelzai kuni onane aneet ЕЉЙ›Й›rti Eeto tammu tadena. Ma aboobi tiЕ‹eere modЙ›na dook loota Е‹ina, ma acinan aneeta ЕЉЙ›Й›rti Eeto kawoya diizwani dЙ”yize ci appe been diЕ‹diЕ‹Й”nta.

24.32: Ma azi Yesu bodo nЙ›, вЂњAgaac zЙ”Й”z nico keete ween moneec. GЙ”Й”n mГЈ acinu itilizit oto artek bЙ”lЙ”k, agayu nЙ”kЙ” izi lЙ”lЙ”Е‹umi ajЙ”n.

24.45: Ma azi Yesu bodo nЙ›, вЂњGabaren jaЕ‹ yo ci abon aliЕ‹liЕ‹onek alaan onin juruЕ‹? Gabaren ci abon nЙ›Й›n o anyek alaani oninЙ› nЙ”Й”nЙ” kabal gabara o miliny dook ka gЙ”Й”n keЕ‹erek niini nЙ”Й”gЙ” dayiin ugeec juruЕ‹.

25.1: Ma azi Yesu bodo nЙ›, вЂњAbil baliin o Joowa kete. Anyak baale dЙ”l ceen amЙ”tЙ” adoma lambЙ›t cigeec, ma aduЕ‹na avЙ” bitaala ka kЙ”Й”t kurumtek eet ci rociinto gЙ”l.

25.9: Ma abЙ›dЙ›kЙ› dЙ”lya ci agЙ›ny o nЙ”Й”gЙ” anek nЙ›, вЂњIzi buk maaltanЙ› ci kanyaka o kidicЙ› tЙ›r. AlaЕ‹ kalЙ›Й›nЙ” ki ageet dook. Odokonyit Й”Й”tЙ” ataalta mЙ›lЙ›gЙ›nyai kataman.вЂќ

25.15: Ma anyek gЙ”Й”n co Е‹aatineeЕ‹ liЕ‹liЕ‹Й”n ci aganЙ” ki nЙ”Й”nЙ”. Anyek eet co guruc ceen 5000. Ma anyek bodo eet co guruc ceen 2000. Ma anyek bodo eet co guruc ceen 1000. Ж†tЙ”Й” ni niini.

11.14: Ma iitene oman aara Yesu miniЕ‹it ci Loryento alagony eet oma aat. Mazi aduЕ‹na miniЕ‹iti nici Й”zЙ”Й”z Й›Й›ti nici bodo labak, ma abiir Й”l dook ooti tЙ›t.

ArЙ”Й”Е‹ niigi kutuguwek naana nЙ”Й”gЙ” gi ci atЙ›Й›t biye ka kagayan kakun Joowa. AkЙ”m zin gi oma ci kagoonei nЙ”Й”gЙ” been nЙ›Й›n. Dooke coma kagoonei nЙ”Й”gЙ” gi ci abil kiyo baal agoononek nyakaЕ‹an o kazi Jona.
11.30: Zin kiyo buk baale Jona een bayen ci Й”l o Ninava e, buk tiЕ‹eere naana ЕЉЙ›Й›rti Eeto Е‹aan keen bayen ci ayelzonek Й”l ci Й”Й” nico noko.

11.32: TiЕ‹eere buk iitene ci roonnyo e iЕ‹aaz Й”l o Ninava, ma akЙ”lak Й”l ci Й”Й” nico noko rooni Joowo, eeci baale niigi iziiyit uuwayi o Jona, ma abadit mony baciinowe ugeec. Bar zin inoko niiga Е‹ina aromenu ki eet ci adiЕ‹diЕ‹ Й”rЙ”Й”t kujuk Jona.вЂќ Vooritin ci alyo
11.33: Ma azi Yesu bodo nЙ›, вЂњAkЙ”m gЙ”Й”n laadun eet ci atokol lamba, ma arek Е‹inti abiilЙ›nЙ›. Bar arek ceez kЙ”rgЙ›n ka kataraan looc ka kicintЙ”i Й”l ci avunak ceez o juruЕ‹.

11.35: Egenyit zin Й”rЙ”Й”t. GЙ›rzЙ› Е‹aan ookci vooritin ci aavi eleetine cugooc o kizi muur.

16.16: Ma anek Yesu nuyak nЙ›, вЂњInoko zin Е‹intimiliny alaЕ‹ acinaЕ‹ rak niiga aneet, ma bodo Е‹intimiliny Е‹aan acinaЕ‹.вЂќ

17.1: Mazi adotiz Yesu zooze nico, adЙ”Е‹ kЙ›bЙ›rЙ› ki tammu taden, ma azi nЙ›, вЂњBaaba, inoko zin iiya iiteni. Anyek zin Е‹Й›Й›run diЕ‹diЕ‹Й”n ka buk kanyin niini ineet diЕ‹diЕ‹Й”n.
17.2: Eeci anyan niina aneet alaazЙ›t ci ka kabali Й”l dook, ka kanyek naana rogЙ›t o abil been nЙ›Й›n Й”l baal anyan niina aneet e.
17.3: Zin rogЙ›t o abil kodot nЙ›Й›n gi o ka kagayin Й”l dook ineet doon een niina Jook ween didi, ma buk agayan niigi aneet keen naana Kiristo baal itoonanan niina.

17.8: Kuduwaya zin naana nЙ”Й”gЙ” zЙ”Й”z baal anyan e. Agamta zin, makacin agaac niigi didi kakun naana Е‹aatun, ma utuyЙ” itoonanan didi aneet niina.

17.12: Ma Е‹inbaal Е‹aan karomena naana ki nЙ”Й”gЙ” e, kozootЙ› nЙ”Й”gЙ” ci baal anyan aneet o juruЕ‹ zaare ugun. KozootЙ› nЙ”Й”gЙ” dook, ma akЙ”m codoi Е‹aatineeЕ‹ ci akoloni, bar akoloni Й›Й›ti baal laadun aduyai waragЙ›wa e doon ka kЙ›lЙ›Й›mЙ› zЙ”Й”z unune.

17.14: Kanyeya naana nЙ”Й”gЙ” zЙ”Й”z unun. Ma amarЙ”i lЙ”Й”ci nЙ”Й”gЙ”, eeci alaЕ‹ niigi een Й”l ci loocu, kiyo buk naana alaЕ‹ keen eet ci loocu o.

17.21: Baaba, anyek nЙ”Й”gЙ” dook kodoye, kiyo kadoye buk naana kibeen ineet o. Ka kagaac Й”l o loocu didi itoonanan niina aneet.

18.1: Mazi akЙ” odotiz Yesu Е‹aryiinta, itiЕ‹gazЙ” niini kibeen nuyak ogin Й”tЙ”Й”zЙ”, ma avЙ” abaayiz nyarat o kazi Kidiron. Anyak Е‹inaante mana, ma avЙ” Yesu kibeen nuyak ogin mane nico eecitЙ”.

18.8: Ma anek Yesu nЙ”Й”gЙ” nЙ›, вЂњMa uyen kanekuЕ‹ nЙ›, Aneeta nЙ›Й›n nici. MatЙ› arooЕ‹nyaЕ‹ aneet, anycek rak nuyak ci karomena o kЙ”tЙ”Й”zЙ”.вЂќ
18.9: Aduwa niini gi nico o ka kЙ›lЙ›Й›m giye baal anЙ› nЙ›, вЂњBaaba, akЙ”m eet ci kakuluz ole baal anyan e.вЂќ
18.10: Maje Saiman PitЙ”r anyak kabaz ci wun, ma avoca tibila, ma aruk gabaren ci alaan o ceez o Joowo kЙ›tЙ›Й›da itat ci azo o vЙ”c. Kazi zaar ci gabaren nico o nЙ› Malkos.
18.11: Ma anek Yesu PitЙ”r nЙ›, вЂњBil. Yizek kabaz cun noko tibil. Abaaban niina kizik bar Е‹aatun kaЕ‹ole naana piryakzЙ›t ci baal laadun anyan baaba ka kipirai o?вЂќ Anyaak Й”l Yesu Anas
18.12: Enico odomta takirnya kibeen alaan uneeЕ‹ kibeen Й”l o gЙ”Й”n abЙ›k ceez o Joowo agamit Yesu, ma acap azЙ›Й›n.
18.13: Ma avЙ”yi rak Й”Й”wa alaane o kazi Anas ween baati dole o ariyi Kayavas. Maje Kayavas alaan ci ceez o Joowo irkite nice.
18.14: Ma zin Kayavas eet baal ilot alaat o Juz anek nЙ›, вЂњAbon adaai Й›Й›ti codoi ole o Juz ka kirigizit Й”l o Juz dook rogЙ›t,вЂќ e nЙ›Й›n. AdaЕ‹ PitЙ”r Yesu
18.15: Oneec ni Saiman PitЙ”r kibeen nuyai oma Yesu. Mazi avЙ”yi Й”l Yesu korge ci alaano o, ook buk nuyaiti Й”lЙ” nici eecitЙ”, eeci Й›Й›ti ci korgu o aga nuyai nico.
18.16: Maje PitЙ”r abil bitaala ajЙ”Е‹Й”z araan. Ma amiironek nuyaiti ona akЙ” kЙ”rga eecitЙ” e araan tatok, ma akЙ” aduwak dole o abЙ›k araan kЙ”kЙ”la PitЙ”r kiiyak kЙ”rЙ”k kЙ›Е‹.

18.18: Maje baaline nice alal laju Й”rЙ”Й”t. Ma adoma gabara ki Й”l o abeke avaat goo ci aavtiyЙ› zЙ”lЙ”mЙ”i. Ma aku aromonek buk PitЙ”r nЙ”Й”gЙ”, ma abilnek goo. Ajin Anas Yesu

18.27: Bodo ni adaЕ‹nyi PitЙ”r azi nЙ›, вЂњAkЙ”m, alaЕ‹ een aneet.вЂќ Enico orowun toloci. Anyaak Й”l Yesu Pailat
18.28: Ma Е‹eere ririwЙ”na uduntai Й”l Yesu ceeze o Kayavas, iiya itoontek niigi nЙ”Й”nЙ” alaan o JerusalЙ›m een Romen kazi Pailat. 18.29: Ma akunak Pailat nЙ”Й”gЙ” bitaala, ma aku anek nЙ›, вЂњMa dim eet nico anyaakaЕ‹ o agЙ”Й”n naa?вЂќ

18.35: Ma abЙ›dЙ›kЙ› Pailat nЙ”Й”nЙ” anek nЙ›, вЂњAlaЕ‹ keen naana eet ci Juz. Ж†l ugun maany kibeen alaat o ceez o Joowo nЙ›Й›n ci anyaanin ineet Е‹ina o. Ma laadun abaca naa?вЂќ

5.23: вЂњAkЙ” mazi kavЙ” karumnya sijin, kamadana agarani. Aje bЙ›kcowa abЙ›k karogi, bar mazi kakola, kavoya eecitЙ”, akЙ”m Й”l oke kina.вЂќ

5.33: Mazi azii Й”l o roonnyo gi nico, otoborit nЙ”Е‹ Й”rЙ”Й”t, ma arЙ”Й”Е‹ niigi ka kuruyit toonnyak kadaayitЙ”.

14.6: DЙ”l o yaai, inoko mГЈ kakunakuЕ‹, ma kaku kazooz otoge calaЕ‹ agayu, katirituЕ‹ oca ku? AkЙ”m kina! Dooke coma kaduwakuЕ‹ igeet zЙ”Й”z o ayelekan Jooi aneet gole ci aziiЕ‹nu juruЕ‹. Ma kaduwakuЕ‹ buk zoozok o gЙ›nyiz o Joowo, ma kademzekuЕ‹ zЙ”Й”z onin gole ci aziiЕ‹nu juruЕ‹.

11.16: Inoko bodo kabЙ›dЙ›kЙ› zЙ”Й”z nico kazi nЙ›, MГЎ anyeku eet oma Е‹aatunooЕ‹ kabaaban bar kizik naana PЙ”l keen tarbal. Mazi agoonu nЙ”kЙ”, abon zin agamanaЕ‹ kizi tarbal nЙ”kЙ” labak ka giye nico kЙ”bЙ”lЙ”l kidicilim.

11.20: Atalnanu niiga voloЕ‹nyok o avu adaЕ‹ekuЕ‹ igeet utuguz kaal o arЙ”Й”Е‹ niigi. Ma anyuЕ‹ iziti gabara cigeec. Ma aruweku niiga nЙ”Й”gЙ” guruc ugooc. Ma apezuЕ‹ niigi igeet, ma apanuЕ‹ vora.
11.21: Aniyu gЙ”Й”n niiga nЙ›, вЂњPЙ”l roЕ‹gec.вЂќ ЕЉЙ›dЙ›t zin didi keegina roЕ‹gЙ›nЙ›n Й”rЙ”Й”t, ma alaЕ‹ kanimnya kutuguza kaal nicoko. Bar zin Е‹aan kamЙ›na kazooz tarbalun nЙ”kЙ”. MГЈ anyak eet ci abЙ”lЙ”li niini gi ci abЙ”lЙ”li, kanim buk naana kabЙ”lЙ”l labak.

11.24: Izi inoko lak tur ci arukan Й”l o Juz nyaboyЙ› eetom kamЙ”tЙ” ki tiin tЙ”rkЙ”c (39).

Ma kaboca daayiza ole ogan looc onan Й›lЙ›. Ma bodo buk kaboca daayiza ole o alaЕ‹ eegin Juz. Ma kaboca gЙ”Й”n daayiza kuturyowe o adikir. Ma kaboca daayiza balalЙ”i. Ma kaboca daayiza ka kotododЙ› liile o appe Й”rЙ”Й”t. Ma bodo kaboca daayiza ole o gЙ”Й”n azi nЙ›, Eegin niigi gЙ”tЙ”nЙ”ga ci tuwento, ma bar alaЕ‹ een didi.
11.27: KaliЕ‹liЕ‹ gЙ”Й”n naana Й”rЙ”Й”t, ma kipirna kaale ci meelik Й”rЙ”Й”t. Lak ci meelik gЙ›r calaЕ‹ kЙ”Й”Е‹Й›. GЙ”Й”n kawЙ” magizЙ›t, ma arukan kЙ”r. Ma gЙ”Й”n akЙ”mnan rumanЙ› ci abon kagamЙ› laju, ma akЙ”mnan buk ceez.

11.29: MГЈ anyak eet calaЕ‹ atuwe juruЕ‹ Е‹aatineeЕ‹, kiinon nЙ”Й”nЙ” Й”rЙ”Й”t kiyo bar kagoon gi nico naana o. MГЈ anyak eet ci abaca oЕ‹ec, kinon nЙ”Й”nЙ” Й”rЙ”Й”t kiyo kabaca oЕ‹ec naana o.
11.30: Zin mГЈ karooЕ‹ kЙ”bЙ”lЙ”l, abon bar kabЙ”lЙ”lЙ› kaal o ayelza roЕ‹gЙ›zЙ›t onan.
11.31: Ma Jooi ween baati Manyi ona Yesu Kiristo, aga niini alaЕ‹ naana kavoloЕ‹. Abon bai anyonek nЙ”Й”nЙ” zanyi iinya dook nЙ”kЙ” been nЙ›Й›n.
11.32: Kiyo iiten baal kaavЙ› kuture o kazi Damacik e, anyek alaani o alaan o adikir kazi Artas takirnya kЙ”Й”t kedetЙ” araane o kaluwa o kutur nice ka mГЈ kakun ka kagamtan.
11.33: Zin enice aryeyan Й”l zitat ci adikir, ma itoonekan niigi aneet bitaalin kaluwa Е‹aati vЙ”lЙ”Е‹ loronta, ma gole nico koroga waanice naana alaane nice.

12.1: AnycaЕ‹ kЙ”bЙ”lЙ”l. Yo nuun akЙ”m bЙ”lЙ”lЙ”ni gi ci abon agoonekan aneet o, kamЙ›na kabolol labak. Inoko kabЙ”lЙ”lЙ› naana wunozyak kibeen kaal o ayelekan Manyi aneet.
12.2: Baale ooyan Jooi aneet zЙ›Й› been tammu taden Й›lЙ›. Izi inoko irkitowa ci Й”Й”tЙ” amЙ”tЙ” wec. AlaЕ‹ zin naana kaga mГЈ da koowa tammu tadena didi karabЙ”Е‹ kawunoze. Aga Jooi doon.

12.4: Zin kaga naana ma waanice kakЙ” kaavi tammu tadena e, kazii kaal ci atЙ›Й›t Й”l biye Й”rЙ”Й”t Й›lЙ› ci akЙ”m eet ci anim koop. Ma alaЕ‹ arЙ”Й”Е‹ Jooi Й”l kozoozit kaal nicoko.

12.6: AlaЕ‹ zin bar karooЕ‹ kЙ”bЙ”lЙ”l, bar zin mГЈ kabolol, alaЕ‹ keen tarbal, eeci kaduwa zЙ”Й”z ceen didi. AlaЕ‹ zin kabolol o, eeci alaЕ‹ karooЕ‹ Й”l oogi kabaabanit kizik bar naana kadiЕ‹diЕ‹ Й”rЙ”Й”t. Abon olla acin niigi kaal o kagoon naana kibeen zЙ”Й”z o kuuwai naana nЙ”Й”gЙ”.
12.7: Anyan Jooi aneet mЙ”Й”riz ci agidan Й”rЙ”Й”t ka calaЕ‹ kadoЕ‹ Й›lЙ› kaale o titiny ayelekan niini aneet wunozyai niceke. Ma mЙ”Й”rizi nici abil kiyo kЙ›Й›t o arukan Loryenti aneet ka kЙ›cЙ›lbЙ›zanan o.

1.1: KayeedekuЕ‹ naaga igeet zЙ”Й”z o akati Yesu ween zЙ”Й”z o rogeto baal abil tЙ” kanaanta laadun e. Kiziikta naaga nЙ”Й”nЙ”, ma kicinta nЙ”Й”nЙ” keberene ogaacak Й›lЙ›. Ma buk kuumta naaga nЙ”Й”nЙ” aziine ogaacak.

2.24: Abon zin azuunu niiga zinzeetinЙ› zЙ”Й”z baal aziiknu Й”Й”wa e juruЕ‹. MГЈ azuunu zЙ”Й”z nice, aromenu koca niiga tup nЙ”kЙ” ki Jook been Е‹Й›Й›rin.

1.7: Iziiyit di gima ce. Anyak Й”l ci meel uuwak vЙ”lЙ”Е‹ ci alaban Й”l, ma inoko azaantozek niigi looc nico dook. Azi niigi nЙ›, вЂњAlaЕ‹ Yesu Kiristo baale aku alye ci eet ci deer.вЂќ Ma Й›Й›ti ci abil nЙ”kЙ” eet ween labjoi, ma amarnin Kiristo nЙ›Й›n.

1.5: LaЕ‹o ween didi, agoon gi ci abon Joowa Й”rЙ”Й”t Й›lЙ› giye ci atirtЙ› gotonogu o tuwento, mayo nuun Е‹aan ga laadun niina nЙ”Й”gЙ” o.

5.13: Ma kazii molok ci kaal o arogi dook tammu tadena, ki loota, ki tЙ”dЙ” loota, been liilowЙ›. Abene niigi dook azi nЙ›, вЂњKanaatit eet ci aavi lecere ci alaazetu noko been NyЙ”Й”n. AganЙ” niigi ki titinyЙ”n, ki zany, been alaazЙ›t nЙ”kЙ” been nЙ›Й›n.вЂќ

6.1: Enico kicina NyЙ”Й”n Е‹aati apilan mutulac o oowu mutulaye ween torgЙ›rЙ›m e. Mazi apila niini mutulac nico, kazii kelegit codoi kelegjene ween wec e agЙ›rЙ›ny molowe ci appe kiyo ajul tammu o azi nЙ›, вЂњIja.вЂќ

6.4: Ma aduЕ‹na bodo jЙ”mi ci meeri. Maje eet ci atЙ”Й”t o anyonek nЙ”Й”nЙ” gina ci wun ki dЙ”yiz ci aaranЙ› ganЙ”n loota, ma anyaakЙ› looc Й”rЙ”Й”n ci akanЙ”n Й”l kadaayitЙ”.

Anyak buk dayiin oogi tЙ”, bar adoЕ‹nyi Й”rЙ”Й”t Й›lЙ›, ma alaЕ‹ anim Й›Й›ti kataala.вЂќ

9.7: Maje giroc nici Й›Й›l kiyo jЙ”manЙ› o eelnek Й”rЙ”Й”n o. Anyak niigi ootinЙ› kaal ci kizik kavurЙ›t ceen warki, ma Й›Й›l Е‹umti kiyo o Й”l o deer o.
